blocks.text: Title race Wednesday: Arsenal five points clear, both they and City in action
Barcelona crushed Atlético 3-0 to reach the Copa del Rey final. Tonight Athletic Club must flip a 1-0 aggregate deficit at Reale Arena — the Basque derby second leg on the line.

blocks.label: 🔜 Must-watch ahead
items: ⛳ Thu 06:00 — Arnold Palmer Invitational, Viktor Hovland in the field at a PGA Signature Event
🏎️ Fri 02:30 — Australian Grand Prix, F1 season opens in Melbourne
🚴 Sat 12:00 — Strade Bianche, Abrahamsen & Hoelgaard on Tuscany's iconic gravel roads
⚽ Sat 21:00 — Barcelona at Athletic Club, San Mamés title-race showdown ★★★★★
